name: IRC_STATES_VL
query: SELECT STATEB.STATE_ID STATE_ID, STATETL.NAME NAME, STATETL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, STATEB.CODE CODE, STATEB.TYPE_CODE TYPE_CODE, STATEB.IS_TERMINAL_FLAG IS_TERMINAL_FLAG, STATEB.MODULE_ID, STATEB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STATEB.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, STATEB.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, STATEB.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, STATEB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STATEB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_STATES_B STATEB, IRC_STATES_TL STATETL WHERE STATEB.STATE_ID = STATETL.STATE_ID AND STATETL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
